fields.name: controlId
fields.label: CCM Control ID
fields.description: Enter a CSA CCM control ID such as CEK-01, IAM-06, or LOG-08.

fields.name: targetFramework
fields.label: Target Framework
fields.description: Optional target framework to map the CCM control into.

output.label: Output Format
output.description: Choose the format for the generated framework mapping output.

reportDir.label: Output Directory
reportDir.description: Optional directory where the framework mapping output should be written.

quiet.label: Quiet output
quiet.description: Suppress progress output while generating the framework mapping.
